// <auto-generated/>
import { OrderStatus, OrderStatusMember } from './enums/OrderStatus';
import { OrderId } from './value-objects/OrderId';
import { OrderLine } from './value-objects/OrderLine';

export class Order {
  readonly id: OrderId;
  readonly lines: readonly OrderLine[];
  readonly status: OrderStatusMember;

  constructor(id: OrderId, lines: readonly OrderLine[], status: OrderStatusMember = OrderStatus.Draft) {
    this.id = id;
    this.lines = lines;
    this.status = status;
  }

  equals(other: Order | undefined): boolean {
    return other !== undefined && this.id.equals(other.id);
  }
}
